source: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities, using CBO account-level expenditure data (June 2024)

categories.label: Health Insurance (Medicare, Medicaid, CHIP, ACA)
categories.notes: Of this, $912B went to Medicare specifically; $626B to Medicaid/CHIP; $125B to ACA subsidies.

categories.label: Interest on the National Debt
categories.notes: Not a program - the cost of past borrowing. Worth flagging distinctly in the UI.

categories.label: Economic Security Programs (SNAP, EITC, unemployment, housing aid)
All Other Programs (education, transportation, science & research, law enforcement, international)
categories.notes: Lumped bucket - can be split further later using OMB Table 3.2 subfunction data if more granularity is wanted.
